a:T495d,<div class="specification">
<p>At the end of a school day, the Headmaster conducted a survey asking students in how many classes they had used the internet.</p>
<p>The data is shown in the following table.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="specification">
<p>The mean number of classes in which a student used the internet is 2.</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State whether the data is discrete or continuous.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Find the value of <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="k" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mi>k</mi>
</math></span>.</p>
<div class="marks">[4]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>It was not possible to ask every person in the school, so the Headmaster arranged the student names in alphabetical order and then asked every 10th person on the list.</p>
<p>Identify the sampling technique used in the survey.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>b:T55e,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>discrete         <em><strong>A1</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong>[1 mark]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\frac{{24 + 60 + 3k + 40 + 15 + 6}}{{88 + k}} = 2" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mfrac>
<mrow>
<mn>24</mn>
<mo>+</mo>
<mn>60</mn>
<mo>+</mo>
<mn>3</mn>
<mi>k</mi>
<mo>+</mo>
<mn>40</mn>
<mo>+</mo>
<mn>15</mn>
<mo>+</mo>
<mn>6</mn>
</mrow>
<mrow>
<mn>88</mn>
<mo>+</mo>
<mi>k</mi>
</mrow>
</mfrac>
<mo>=</mo>
<mn>2</mn>
</math></span>       <em><strong>M1A1</strong></em></p>
<p><strong>Note:</strong> Award <em><strong>M1</strong> </em>for substitution into the formula for the mean, award <strong>A1</strong> for a correct equation.</p>
<p>attempt to solve their equation       <em><strong>(M1)</strong></em></p>
<p><span class="mjpage"><math alttext="k" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mi>k</mi>
</math></span> = 31       <em><strong>A1</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong>[4 marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>systematic      <em><strong>A1</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong>[1 mark]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/maths/topic/4/","children":["← back to ","Mathematics"," topic ","4"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"SPM.1.SL.TZ0.3"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Mathematics"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"AI"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"SPM"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","sl-4-1-concepts-reliability-and-sampling-techniques"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
